title: Fluent Agents Studio
big_statement: The complete user guide — from zero to hero

title: Your first look
bullets: Left: library of everything you've made
Amber New Generation starts every project
Right: workspace — "From source to sound"

title: Step 1 — the Source box
bullets: Choose URL or PDF upload
Paste a web address in the field
Or drag a PDF onto the box
Filename shows in amber when attached

title: Step 2 — the three decisions
bullets: Mode: Podcast, Summary, or Readout
Run Until: Script Draft (cheap start) or Full
Audience: describe who's listening
Personality & voices — optional

title: Step 3 — Slides & Captions
bullets: Slides: web, video, PowerPoint, or combo
Captions: Burned in, or Toggle on/off
Animations glide content in element by element
Amber Start Generation begins it all

title: The four stations
bullets: Stop anywhere; later stations update automatically
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.b{opacity:0;animation:f .5s ease forwards}.b1{animation-delay:.1s}.b2{animation-delay:.5s}.b3{animation-delay:.9s}.b4{animation-delay:1.3s}@keyframes f{to{opacity:1}}</style><line x1="60" y1="310" x2="940" y2="310" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/><g class="b b1"><rect x="50" y="250" width="180" height="120" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="140" y="300" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" text-anchor="middle">Script</text><text x="140" y="338" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">words written</text></g><g class="b b2"><rect x="290" y="250" width="180" height="120" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="380" y="300" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" text-anchor="middle">Slides</text><text x="380" y="338" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">visuals designed</text></g><g class="b b3"><rect x="530" y="250" width="180" height="120" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="620" y="300" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" text-anchor="middle">Voice</text><text x="620" y="338" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">voice recorded</text></g><g class="b b4"><rect x="770" y="250" width="180" height="120" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="860" y="300" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" text-anchor="middle">Outputs</text><text x="860" y="338" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">packaged</text></g><g fill="#e8a13c"><path d="M232 310 l30 0 M258 304 l10 6 -10 6 z"/><path d="M472 310 l30 0 M498 304 l10 6 -10 6 z"/><path d="M712 310 l30 0 M738 304 l10 6 -10 6 z"/></g></svg>

title: Station 1 — Script
bullets: Every spoken line, numbered, with speaker badges
Revise in plain words; other lines stay untouched

title: Station 2 — Slides
bullets: Storyboard of cards, one per slide
Real images and auto-drawn charts
Asset Inventory lists every visual

title: Templates — your brand
bullets: Upload a theme, style guide, or screenshot
Studio reads your colors and fonts
Save once, reuse from a dropdown

title: Station 3 — Voice review
bullets: Play button dims screen, shows slide large
You hear only that slide's narration

title: Fixing what's off
bullets: Direct by line number; audio re-records in ~1 min
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.n{opacity:0;animation:f .6s ease forwards}.n1{animation-delay:.1s}.n2{animation-delay:.6s}.n3{animation-delay:1.1s}@keyframes f{to{opacity:1}}</style><g fill="none" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"><path d="M500 170 A150 150 0 0 1 630 400"/><path d="M630 400 A150 150 0 0 1 370 400"/><path d="M370 400 A150 150 0 0 1 500 170"/></g><g class="n n1"><circle cx="500" cy="160" r="70" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="500" y="155" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" text-anchor="middle">Review</text><text x="500" y="185" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">slide by slide</text></g><g class="n n2"><circle cx="665" cy="415" r="70" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="665" y="410" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" text-anchor="middle">Revise</text><text x="665" y="440" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">plain English</text></g><g class="n n3"><circle cx="335" cy="415" r="70" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="335" y="410" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" text-anchor="middle">Re-render</text><text x="335" y="440" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle">~1 min</text></g><g fill="#e8a13c"><path d="M604 300 l12 -6 -2 14 z"/><path d="M500 486 l-8 -12 16 0 z"/><path d="M396 300 l-10 8 -2 -14 z"/></g></svg>

title: Station 4 — Outputs
bullets: Five finished files, each on its own card
~40¢ per full production; quick reruns ~1/10 cost

title: Which output do I need?
bullets: Render assembles all five from your current work
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.r{opacity:0;animation:f .5s ease forwards}.r1{animation-delay:.1s}.r2{animation-delay:.4s}.r3{animation-delay:.7s}.r4{animation-delay:1s}.r5{animation-delay:1.3s}@keyframes f{to{opacity:1}}</style><g font-family="sans-serif"><g class="r r1"><rect x="60" y="70" width="260" height="70" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="85" y="115" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="28">Audio</text><text x="360" y="115" fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="26">just listen to the episode</text></g><g class="r r2"><rect x="60" y="165" width="260" height="70" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="85" y="210" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="28">Transcript</text><text x="360" y="210" fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="26">read it, timestamped</text></g><g class="r r3"><rect x="60" y="260" width="260" height="70" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="85" y="305" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="28">Web show</text><text x="360" y="305" fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="26">send one file to anyone</text></g><g class="r r4"><rect x="60" y="355" width="260" height="70" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="85" y="400" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="28">Video</text><text x="360" y="400" fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="26">upload anywhere</text></g><g class="r r5"><rect x="60" y="450" width="260" height="70" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="85" y="495" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="28">PowerPoint</text><text x="360" y="495" fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="26">present it yourself</text></g></g></svg>

title: Your turn
big_statement: One pasted link, and you're a producer.
